content_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the source item under its public-domain-unless-noted baseline; licensed music is excluded from this transcript-only benchmark.

transcript_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the exact English VTT as an official same-item caption asset. Private preservation is provisional under the cited terms; legal/policy review remains required.

content_completeness.rationale: The official source publishes the complete associated transcript and the final cue reaches the source-media duration.

retention_and_derivation.rationale: Private transcript preservation only; soundtrack/media are link-only and model-generated output is not attributed to NASA.

third_party_caveats: Universal Production Music track is not retained, extracted, or redistributed.

version_equivalence.evidence: NASA Science embeds the exact YouTube ID and links to SVS 13322; the SVS Safety Video group co-locates the LQ MP4 and same-stem VTT.
